title: schizachyrium scoparium var. neomexicanum
intro: Schizachyrium scoparium var. neomexicanum, also known as the New Mexican little bluestem, is a variety of the Schizachyrium scoparium plant, a type of grass native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Schizachyrium scoparium var. neomexicanum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and even help manage diabetes and high blood pressure. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and reap its numerous health benefits.
